value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px;">Tech-Stack</h1><div><ul><li><font style="font-weight: bold; font-size: 15px;">Front-end</font></li><li>React.js</li><li>Tailwind CSS</li><li>Figma</li></ul></div><div><ul><li><font style="font-weight: bold; font-size: 15px;">Back-end</font></li><li>Java-Springboot</li><li>Http Communication</li><li>SQL (Oracle/ My SQL)</li><li>NO SQL (Mongo DB)</li></ul></div><div><ul><li><span style="font-size: 15px;"><b>Dev-ops</b></span></li><li>AWS</li><li>Docker</li><li>Openshift</li></ul><div><br></div></div><div>Additional: Kafka, GSAP, AI Integration</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="310" width="390" x="430" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
